parameters.query:
SELECT
  l.id,
  l.name,
  COALESCE(
    l.metadata->>'slug',
    lower(regexp_replace(l.name, '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g'))
  ) AS slug
FROM locations l
JOIN systems s
  ON s.id = l.system_id
JOIN active_systems asys
  ON asys.id = s.id
LEFT JOIN trade_terminals tt
  ON tt.location_id = l.id
LEFT JOIN prices p
  ON p.terminal_id = tt.id
 AND p.asset_type = 'commodity'
 AND p.sell_price > 0
WHERE
  (
    (l.metadata->>'is_available_live') = '1'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM trade_terminals tt2
      JOIN prices p2
        ON p2.terminal_id = tt2.id
       AND p2.asset_type = 'commodity'
       AND p2.sell_price > 0
      WHERE tt2.location_id = l.id
    )
  )
GROUP BY
  l.id,
  l.name,
  l.metadata
ORDER BY
  l.name;

SELECT
  l.id,
  l.name,
  COALESCE(
    l.metadata->>'slug',
    lower(regexp_replace(l.name, '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g'))
  ) AS slug,
  l.location_type,
  s.name AS system_name,
  b.name AS body_name,
  l.source_id,
  CASE
    WHEN (l.metadata->>'is_space_station') = '1'
         AND b.name IS NOT NULL
      THEN 'Orbits ' || b.name
    WHEN b.name IS NOT NULL
      THEN b.name
    ELSE 'N/A'
  END AS body_name_or_orbit,
  l.metadata->>'id' AS uex_location_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT tt.id) FILTER (WHERE tt.id IS NOT NULL) AS terminals_total,
  COALESCE(
    JSONB_AGG(DISTINCT tt.name ORDER BY tt.name)
      FILTER (WHERE tt.id IS NOT NULL),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) AS terminals_list
FROM locations l
JOIN systems s
  ON s.id = l.system_id
JOIN active_systems asys
  ON asys.id = s.id
LEFT JOIN bodies b
  ON b.id = l.body_id
LEFT JOIN trade_terminals tt
  ON tt.location_id = l.id
WHERE l.id = '{{$json["id"]}}'
GROUP BY
  l.id,
  l.name,
  l.metadata,
  l.location_type,
  s.name,
  b.name;

INSERT INTO jsonkb_changes (entity_type, entity_id, entity_slug, jsonkb_file_path, content_hash)
VALUES (
  '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.jsonkb.entity_type}}',
  '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.jsonkb.entity_id}}',
  '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.slug}}',
  '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.jsonkb_file_path}}',
  '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.jsonkb.provenance.content_hash}}'
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
SELECT content_hash FROM jsonkb_store WHERE entity_slug = '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.slug}}' AND entity_type = '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.jsonkb.entity_type}}'
